products.name: Aerosocks
products.description: Lightweight aero cycling socks designed for speed, comfort, and grip. Made with breathable stretch fabric and anti-slip silicone to keep your feet secure and dry during rides. Perfect for cycling, running, and training.
specs: Anti-Slip Silicone Grip : Keeps socks firmly in place inside shoes for better control
Aero Design : Enhances performance with a sleek, pro-style look
Breathable Fabric : Keeps feet cool and sweat-free during long rides
Elastic Compression Fit : Snug fit for improved comfort and support
Lightweight & Durable : Ideal for daily training and racing use
Multi-Sport Use : Suitable for cycling, running, gym, and outdoor sports
products.keywords: Aerosocks GOB

products.name: Alloy Integrated Computer Mount
products.description: Designed for modern road and gravel bikes, the Alloy Integrated Computer Mount provides a secure, lightweight, and aerodynamic solution for mounting your cycling computer. Manufactured from high-strength CNC-machined aluminum alloy, this mount offers exceptional durability and stability while maintaining a sleek cockpit appearance. Positioned directly in front of the handlebar, it delivers optimal screen visibility for easy monitoring of speed, distance, navigation, and training data. Whether you’re racing, training, or commuting, this integrated mount keeps your device secure and accessible on every ride. Compatible with popular cycling computer brands including: * Garmin * Wahoo * XOSS * iGPSPORT * Magene * Bryton
products.keywords: Alloy Integrated Computer Mount Cadence Life

products.name: CadenceLife Trail Hydration Vest with 2L Water Bladder
products.description: Stay hydrated and carry your essentials comfortably with the CadenceLife Trail Hydration Vest. Designed for runners, cyclists, hikers, and endurance athletes, this lightweight vest provides secure storage for hydration bottles, nutrition, phones, keys, and other essentials without restricting movement. Its ergonomic fit and adjustable straps minimize bounce, allowing you to focus on performance during long training sessions and race days. Perfect for marathons, trail running, ultra-distance events, cycling, trekking, and outdoor adventures.
products.keywords: CadenceLife Trail Hydration Vest with 2L Water Bladder Cadence Life

products.name: Carbon Integrated Computer Mount
products.description: Upgrade your cockpit with the Carbon Integrated Computer Mount, engineered for cyclists who demand a clean, lightweight, and aerodynamic setup. Designed specifically for integrated carbon handlebars, this mount securely positions your cycling computer directly in front of the stem for optimal visibility and easy access to ride data. Constructed from high-strength carbon fiber, the mount delivers exceptional stiffness and durability while keeping weight to a minimum. Its streamlined design enhances the overall appearance of your bike and provides a stable platform for GPS cycling computers during training, racing, and endurance rides.
products.keywords: Carbon Integrated Computer Mount Cadence Life

products.name: CYCPLUS H2 Heart Rate Monitor - Dual Mode ANT+ & Bluetooth Chest Strap
products.description: Boost your training performance with the CYCPLUS H2 heart rate monitor, designed for accurate real-time tracking during cycling, running, and workouts. Using dual ANT+ and Bluetooth connectivity, it easily connects to bike computers, smartwatches, and fitness apps for seamless data monitoring. The lightweight chest strap ensures a secure and comfortable fit, while advanced ECG-based sensing delivers precise heart rate data to help you train in the right zone every time.
products.keywords: CYCPLUS H2 Heart Rate Monitor - Dual Mode ANT+ & Bluetooth Chest Strap Cycplus

products.name: HR Replacement Belt

products.name: MCYCLE Aerosocks
products.description: Engineered for speed, comfort, and endurance, the MCYCLE Men Crew Thin Aero Compression Cycling Socks are designed for cyclists who demand maximum performance on every ride. Featuring an aerodynamic compression upper and breathable moisture-wicking foot section, these socks help reduce drag while maintaining exceptional comfort during training, racing, and long-distance rides. The lightweight stretch construction provides a secure race-fit feel, while the compression cuff helps keep the socks firmly in place throughout intense efforts. Ideal for road cycling, time trials, triathlon, gravel riding, and indoor training sessions.
products.keywords: MCYCLE Aerosocks MCYCLE

products.name: MCYCLE Free Cutting Glove
products.description: Ride in comfort and confidence with the MCYCLE Free Cutting Short Finger Cycling Gloves. Designed for road cyclists, MTB riders, and fitness enthusiasts, these lightweight half-finger gloves provide excellent breathability, grip, and shock absorption for every ride. The free-cut elastic fabric offers a seamless, pressure-free fit around the wrist, while the padded palm helps reduce road vibration and hand fatigue during long-distance rides. Quick-drying and highly breathable materials keep your hands cool and comfortable even during intense summer training sessions. Perfect for cycling, indoor training, commuting, fitness workouts, and outdoor adventures.

products.name: MCYCLE Knitted Sport Crew Socks
products.description: Experience all-day comfort with the MCYCLE Knitted Sport Crew Socks. Perfect for cyclists, runners, gym enthusiasts, and active lifestyles.

products.description: Ride in comfort and style with the MCYCLE Pedal Slave Knitted Cycling Socks. products.name: MCYCLE PU Neoprene Cycling Overshoes
products.description: Stay protected from rain, wind, mud, and cold weather with the MCYCLE PU Neoprene Cycling Overshoes. Designed for road cyclists, MTB riders, and commuters, these high-performance shoe covers feature durable PU-coated neoprene construction that provides excellent water resistance, thermal insulation, and aerodynamic protection. The stretch-fit design ensures a snug fit over cycling shoes, while reinforced high-wear zones enhance durability for long-term use in challenging riding conditions
products.keywords: MCYCLE PU Neoprene Cycling Overshoes MCYCLE

products.name: MCYCLE Spring Breathable Waterproof Cycling Shoe Cover
products.description: Protect your feet and cycling shoes from rain, wind, road spray, and dirt with the MCYCLE MP060 Cycling Shoe Cover. Designed for spring and mild-weather riding, this lightweight overshoe combines water-resistant protection with breathable comfort, helping riders stay dry without overheating. The high-stretch fabric delivers a secure aerodynamic fit, while reinforced wear zones enhance durability for everyday training, commuting, and long-distance rides. Suitable for both road and MTB cycling shoes
products.keywords: MCYCLE Spring Breathable Waterproof Cycling Shoe Cover MCYCLE

products.name: OEM Screenless Fitness Band
products.description: The Screenless Smart Bracelet is a lightweight health and fitness wearable designed for users who prefer continuous health tracking without the distraction of a display. It automatically records daily activity, heart rate, blood oxygen levels, sleep patterns, calories burned, and step count, syncing all data to the RWfit mobile app via Bluetooth. Its IP68 waterproof rating makes it suitable for everyday use, while the magnetic charging system and long battery life of up to 25 days (30 days standby) reduce charging frequency. The premium nylon strap and metal-plastic body provide a comfortable and durable design for all-day wear.
products.keywords: OEM Screenless Fitness Band Cadence Life

products.name: Performance Cycling Baselayer
products.description: Stay dry, comfortable, and focused on every ride with the Performance Cycling Baselayer. Designed as the first layer next to your skin, this lightweight technical garment efficiently wicks moisture away from the body, helping regulate temperature in both hot and cool conditions. The breathable stretch fabric delivers a second-skin fit that moves naturally with your body, while quick-drying technology prevents sweat buildup during intense training sessions. Whether worn under a cycling jersey in summer or layered beneath thermal clothing in winter, this baselayer enhances comfort throughout every ride. Baselayers are designed to move sweat away from the skin and help regulate body temperature during exercise.
products.keywords: Performance Cycling Baselayer Cadence Life

products.name: Performance Running Cap
products.description: Stay cool, protected, and focused on every run with the Performance Running Cap. Designed for runners, cyclists, and outdoor athletes, this lightweight cap features breathable fabric and a moisture-wicking design to help keep sweat away from your face. The adjustable fit ensures all-day comfort, while the curved visor provides protection from sun and glare during training and race days. Perfect for running, cycling, walking, hiking, gym sessions, and outdoor adventures.
products.keywords: Performance Running Cap Cadence Life

Designed with a lightweight TR90 frame and a wraparound fit, they offer all-day comfort and protection from wind, dust, and debris. Built for speed and style, they deliver the perfect balance of performance and durability for any outdoor activity.
products.keywords: Photochromic Sunglass KD Cadence Life

products.name: Waterproof & Windproof Cycling Shoe Covers
products.description: Stay protected in any weather with Rrskit cycling shoe covers, designed to keep your feet dry, clean, and comfortable during every ride. Made from lightweight, elastic, and waterproof material, these covers shield your shoes from rain, wind, mud, and road spray. The aerodynamic, stretch-fit design ensures a snug fit over your cycling shoes, reducing drag while maintaining flexibility and comfort. Whether you’re riding on wet roads or training in unpredictable conditions, these overshoes deliver reliable protection and performance. Built for road cyclists and MTB riders, they are easy to wear, durable, and perfect for daily rides or long-distance training.
products.keywords: Waterproof & Windproof Cycling Shoe Covers rskit

products.name: X-TIGER Polarised Sunglass- 3 Interchangeable Lens kit
products.description: Take your outdoor performance to the next level with X-TIGER polarized sports sunglasses, designed for cycling, running, fishing, and more. Featuring 5 interchangeable lenses, you can easily switch based on light conditions-whether it’s bright sunlight, low light, or night riding. The polarized lens reduces glare and enhances clarity, while the lightweight TR90 frame ensures durability and all-day comfort. With a wraparound design and adjustable nose pads, these sunglasses provide a secure fit and full protection from wind, dust, and debris. Perfect for athletes who need versatility, performance, and style in one complete eyewear system.
products.keywords: X-TIGER Polarised Sunglass- 3 Interchangeable Lens kit X-TIGER
